title: No Java Edition
description: The Original Minecraft title without Java Edition.
body:
# Bothered by the new Java Edition text on your screen?

### That’s why **No Java Edition (NJE)** exists.

**No Java Edition** is a minimalist resource pack that does one simple thing: it removes the **“Java Edition”** text from beneath the Minecraft logo.

Nothing else is changed. No UI edits, no texture changes, no performance impact, just a cleaner title screen.

The pack is fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.16.5 and newer**. It can also work on older versions by downloading any release and ignoring the game’s “incompatible” warning , this will not affect functionality.

## Preview

![Before NJE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b850c7629cf923a916c304338e8af98875b29c.png)

![After NJE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a911491b2e730f1d56550a36789d315506ea800f.png)

Thank you for using **No Java Edition**.

You could also check out **[Clear Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clearcrops)**.
